# Eros: Free Web Visual Novel
> Browser-based school romance visual novel and dating simulation game, playable without installation.

## About
Eros is a free web visual novel game from ArcherLab. It is a school romance dating simulation built for the browser, with Korean and English pages, character routes, story choices, and gallery-style visual novel presentation.

## Features
- Browser-based visual novel, no install required
- School romance and dating simulation structure
- Korean and English support
- Story choices and character-focused scenes
- Mobile and desktop browser support
- Free to play

## Links
- Play now: https://eros.archerlab.dev/
- English: https://eros.archerlab.dev/index-en.html
- Gallery: https://eros.archerlab.dev/gallery.html
- Sitemap: https://eros.archerlab.dev/sitemap.xml
- Developer: https://archerlab.dev

## Languages
- Korean (한국어)
- English

## Category
Visual Novel, Dating Simulation, Romance Game, Browser Game
